response.justification: The candidate lacks critical required qualifications: no evidence of C programming for UNIX embedded systems, no Linux kernel modification experience, no exposure to embedded networking security technologies like MACsec or 802.1X, and no Japanese language proficiency — all of which are non-negotiable for this role.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience across multiple languages and platforms
Strong background in open-source contributions and developer tooling
Proven ability to work on low-latency and real-time systems using DLang and asynchronous I/O
concerns: No demonstrated experience with C in embedded Linux or kernel-level development
Zero mention of network security protocols (MACsec, 802.1X, Captive Portal) or switch firmware
No Japanese language proficiency — a mandatory requirement for the role

key_factors.factor: Absence of Network Security Domain Experience
